title: Project Manager – Offshore Energy (Permanent Staff)
description_raw:
Aker Solutions are seeking a Project Manager to join their Aberdeen office on a permanent basis. This is a staff role within the company’s Brownfield & Modifications (BF&M) business unit.

The successful candidate will manage the engineering and project management delivery of brownfield topsides modification scopes on existing North Sea assets. Projects range from £500k to £20m in EPIC value.

What you will do:
- Lead a multidisciplinary project team (process, mechanical, structural, piping, electrical, instrumentation) through concept, FEED and detailed design stages
- Own the project commercial baseline and manage deviations via formal change management
- Chair weekly project reviews and monthly client progress meetings
- Ensure deliverables comply with the applicable design codes (ASME, DNV, ISO 19902) and client-specific engineering standards

What we are looking for:
- BEng / MEng in mechanical or process engineering
- 7+ years’ project management experience in offshore or subsea environment
- Chartered Engineer status (CEng MIMechE or equivalent) preferred
- Significant client-facing experience
- PMP or APM PMQ

Salary: £75,000–£85,000 per annum, company pension (8% employer), 25 days holiday + 8 bank holidays, private medical insurance, share save scheme
Role type: Permanent, full-time staff
Location: Aberdeen (hybrid: 3 office + 2 remote per week)
